query:
CREATE TABLE `portal_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`portalUserId` int NOT NULL,
	`ticketId` int,
	`ticketNumber` varchar(32),
	`type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ticket_status_changed',
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`isRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAtUtc` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `portal_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 5DX9DXKuVqxA9jr.15b4f38c7c58 --database 9wsYutxKhSEzLK7XGG22CU --execute CREATE TABLE `portal_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`portalUserId` int NOT NULL,
	`ticketId` int,
	`ticketNumber` varchar(32),
	`type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ticket_status_changed',
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`isRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAtUtc` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `portal_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
